rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §22.105, which governs written elections by school employees for health care supplementation. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Each school year, an active employee must elect in writing whether to designate a portion of the employee's compensation to be used as health care supplementation under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated topic (school employee health care supplementation elections).
